task: Pick up the black bowl between the plate and the ramekin, and place it on the plate
scene_summary: The target black bowl is located on the tabletop between a striped plate and a small ramekin. Nearby objects include a moka pot, two metallic bowls, a drawer cabinet, a cookie box, an induction plate, and a black pan-like object. The robot must grasp the black bowl and place it onto the plate while avoiding collisions with nearby objects.

relevant_objects.reason: This is the object to be grasped and transported.
The black bowl must be placed on the plate as the final task goal.
It is close to the black bowl and may be accidentally contacted during grasping or lifting.
It is tall, bulky, and has protruding handle geometry, so it creates collision and toppling risk.
It is close to the manipulation area and may be displaced by unintended contact.
It is close to the manipulation area and may be displaced by unintended contact.
It forms a rigid workspace boundary and has handles that may collide with the robot or carried bowl.
It is flat and near the moka pot, but less relevant unless the robot path passes over it.
It is a rigid tabletop object near the robot path and should not be contacted.
It is near the right side of the workspace and may constrain lateral robot motion.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The robot should eventually grasp the black bowl.

predicates.name: grasped(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: True when the gripper securely holds the black bowl.

cbf_candidate.h_x: Not directly a CBF; use a task objective, CLF, or reward.

assumptions: A grasp detector or gripper state estimate is available.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The robot should eventually place the black bowl on the plate.
stl_constraints.stl: F_[0,T](on(black_bowl, plate, t) AND NOT grasped(black_bowl,t))

predicates.name: on(black_bowl, plate, t)
predicates.definition: The black bowl is supported by and spatially aligned with the plate.

predicates.name: NOT grasped(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: The robot has released the black bowl.

cbf_candidate.h_x: Not directly a safety CBF; use task completion predicate or goal-reaching controller.

assumptions: The plate pose and black bowl pose are available.
The plate is stable enough to support the black bowl.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The end effector should avoid unintended collision with the ramekin while approaching or carrying the black bowl.

predicates.name: d(ee, ramekin, t) >= d_min_ramekin
predicates.definition: The end-effector distance from the ramekin is at least the minimum safe clearance.

assumptions: The ramekin pose is available from perception.
The ramekin is not the target.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The end effector should avoid unintended collision with the moka pot.

predicates.name: d(ee, moka_pot, t) >= d_min_moka
predicates.definition: The end-effector distance from the moka pot is at least the minimum safe clearance.

assumptions: The moka pot is tall and collision-prone.
The moka pot pose includes its handle and lid geometry.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The robot should slow down near the moka pot because it is tall and easy to collide with or tip.

predicates.name: d(ee, moka_pot, t) < d_caution_moka
predicates.definition: The end effector is inside the caution radius around the moka pot.

predicates.name: ||v_ee(t)|| <= v_safe_moka
predicates.definition: The end-effector speed is below the safe velocity threshold near the moka pot.

assumptions: End-effector velocity is available.
The moka pot is unstable enough to require slow motion nearby.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The carried black bowl should avoid collision with the ramekin after grasping.

predicates.name: grasped(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: The robot is holding the black bowl.

predicates.name: d(black_bowl, ramekin, t) >= d_min_bowl_ramekin
predicates.definition: The carried black bowl remains at least a safe clearance away from the ramekin.

assumptions: The black bowl pose can be estimated while grasped.
The carried object can be treated as part of the robot collision geometry.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The carried black bowl should avoid collision with the moka pot.

predicates.name: d(black_bowl, moka_pot, t) >= d_min_bowl_moka
predicates.definition: The carried black bowl remains at least a safe clearance away from the moka pot.

assumptions: The moka pot is close enough to be a relevant obstacle.
The robot may move the bowl laterally across the tabletop.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The end effector should not make unintended contact with non-target tabletop objects.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T](NOT contact(ee, ramekin, t) AND NOT contact(ee, moka_pot, t) AND NOT contact(ee, silver_bowl_1, t) AND NOT contact(ee, silver_bowl_2, t) AND NOT contact(ee, drawer_cabinet, t) AND NOT contact(ee, induction_plate, t) AND NOT contact(ee, black_pan, t))

predicates.name: contact(ee, object, t)
predicates.definition: True if the end effector physically contacts a non-target object.

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_contact_obj(x) = d(ee, object) - d_min_object for each non-target object

assumptions: Contact or distance-to-object estimates are available.
The black bowl is the only object intended to be grasped.

stl_constraints.natural_language: Avoid passing directly above the ramekin or silver bowls unless sufficient vertical clearance exists.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T]((above(ee, ramekin, t) OR above(ee, silver_bowl_1, t) OR above(ee, silver_bowl_2, t)) -> d_z(ee, object, t) >= d_vertical_safe)

predicates.name: above(ee, object, t)
predicates.definition: The end effector projects horizontally over the object footprint.

predicates.name: d_z(ee, object, t) >= d_vertical_safe
predicates.definition: The vertical clearance between the end effector and object top surface is at least the safe vertical margin.

assumptions: Object top heights are estimated from depth or known geometry.
Passing above bowls can be allowed if vertical clearance is large.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The end effector should stay within the tabletop manipulation workspace.

predicates.name: inside(ee, tabletop_workspace, t)
predicates.definition: The end-effector position lies within predefined tabletop workspace bounds.

cbf_candidate.h_x: h_workspace_i(x) = boundary_i_margin(ee) for each workspace boundary

assumptions: Workspace boundaries are known from the environment.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The robot should preserve the black bowl upright orientation while carrying it.

predicates.name: upright(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: The black bowl orientation remains within theta_max_bowl tilt from vertical.

assumptions: The black bowl may be open-top and should not be tilted excessively.
Object orientation can be estimated while grasped.

stl_constraints.natural_language: After grasping, the black bowl should move toward the plate and eventually be centered over it before release.
stl_constraints.stl: F_[T_grasp,T](above(black_bowl, plate, t) AND d_xy(black_bowl, plate, t) <= d_place_center)

predicates.name: above(black_bowl, plate, t)
predicates.definition: The black bowl is vertically above the plate support region.

predicates.name: d_xy(black_bowl, plate, t) <= d_place_center
predicates.definition: The horizontal distance between the black bowl center and plate center is below placement tolerance.

cbf_candidate.h_x: Task placement objective, not a pure safety barrier.

assumptions: The desired placement point is the center of the plate.
The plate is the intended support surface.

stl_constraints.natural_language: The black bowl should not be released unless it is above the plate.
stl_constraints.stl: G_[0,T]((release_command(black_bowl,t)) -> (above(black_bowl, plate, t) AND d_xy(black_bowl, plate, t) <= d_place_center))

predicates.name: release_command(black_bowl,t)
predicates.definition: The robot is opening the gripper to release the black bowl.

predicates.name: d_xy(black_bowl, plate, t) <= d_place_center
predicates.definition: The black bowl is horizontally aligned with the plate.

assumptions: Release command is observable from the robot controller.
The plate region is large enough to receive the black bowl.

predicate_dictionary.d(a,b,t): Euclidean distance between object or robot entity a and b at time t.
predicate_dictionary.d_xy(a,b,t): Horizontal-plane distance between a and b at time t.
predicate_dictionary.d_z(a,b,t): Vertical clearance between a and the top surface of b at time t.
predicate_dictionary.contact(a,b,t): True if a and b are physically touching.
predicate_dictionary.grasped(object,t): True if the robot gripper securely holds the object.
predicate_dictionary.on(a,b,t): True if object a is supported by object or surface b.
predicate_dictionary.above(a,b,t): True if a is vertically above the footprint of b.
predicate_dictionary.inside(a,region,t): True if a lies inside the specified region.
predicate_dictionary.upright(object,t): True if the object tilt angle is within an allowed upright threshold.
predicate_dictionary.release_command(object,t): True when the gripper command is releasing the object.
predicate_dictionary.||v_ee(t)||: Magnitude of the end-effector linear velocity.
predicate_dictionary.d_min_object: Minimum safe clearance from a generic obstacle.
predicate_dictionary.d_caution_object: Distance threshold defining a slower caution zone around an object.
predicate_dictionary.v_safe_object: Maximum allowed end-effector speed inside the caution zone.
predicate_dictionary.d_place_center: Maximum allowed horizontal placement error relative to the plate center.

uncertainties: The exact 3D distance between the black bowl, plate, and ramekin requires depth or object pose estimation.
The visually observed target is assumed to be the dark/black bowl between the striped plate and ramekin.
The moka pot appears tall and collision-prone, but its exact stability and mass are unknown.
The plate boundary and placement tolerance require segmentation or known object geometry.
Some objects visible from one view may be partially occluded in another, so fused multi-view perception is preferred.
